title: Beige Cotton Embroidered Suit Salwaar
body_html:
Product Description

Add elegance to your wardrobe with this beige embroidered salwar kameez set, perfect for festive occasions and celebrations. The kameez features delicate blue floral embroidery on a soft beige cotton base, combining tradition with contemporary style. Paired with a mesmerizing ombre blue dupatta transitioning to cream with subtle metallic details, this outfit exudes sophistication and charm.

Product Highlights:

  • Kameez: Beige straight-cut cotton with blue floral embroidery.
  • Salwar: Straight-fit matching beige pants for comfort and style.
  • Dupatta: Ombre blue chiffon dupatta with metallic striped accents.
  • Fabric: Lightweight and breathable cotton blend.
  • Occasion: Perfect for festive gatherings, family events, or day celebrations.
  • Care: Dry clean recommended for best results.

title: Blossom Blush Chikankari Kurti Palazzo Set
body_html:
Product Details

Fabric Heavy Rayon
Size M, L, XL, XXL
Design Kurti Palazzo with Lakhnawi design
Occasion Formal & Informal gatherings, Parties, Weddings, and Festive Occasions
Vibe Adds a regal and festive touch to your look


Step into a world of grace and understated charm with our Blossom Blush Kurti Palazzo Set, beautifully crafted in a soft rose-pink palette. This ethereal ensemble is adorned with authentic Chikankari embroidery, the traditional white-on-white handwork from the heart of Lucknow, India.

Chikankari, an age-old art form, is renowned for its intricate detailing using stitches like Phanda, Murri, Jali, and Keel Kangan, creating a delicate, shadow-like effect that feels light and luxurious. Every motif is a celebration of feminine elegance and cultural richness.

Perfect for daytime festivities, intimate celebrations, or festive occasions, this set offers a seamless blend of comfort and sophistication—designed for the modern muse who values heritage with a touch of contemporary grace.

🌈 Rosy Blossom Pink with White Accents


✨Styling Tip:

Pair with pastel juttis or mojaris and minimal silver jewelry for a dreamy, ethereal look. Add soft curls and a rosy lip to complement the blush tones of the ensemble.
tags: bookeasy, ethnic, indian tradtional, kurti palazzo, rayon, traditional wear

title: Crimson Wine Floral Chinon Exclusive Plus Size Designer Embroidered Suit Sets!
body_html:
Product Details

Fabric Chinon
Size 5XL
Design Straight-cut kurta
Occasion Parties, Weddings, Official and Festive Occasions
Vibe Elegant Everyday, Floral Festivity, Plus-Size Empowerment

 

Embrace graceful tradition with a modern twist in this Crimson Wine Floral Chinon Designer Suit set. Crafted in soft Chinon fabric with intricate embroidery and floral motifs—tailored for comfort, style, and inclusivity. Ideal for the modern woman who cherishes cultural elegance without compromising on ease or fit.

🌈 Color Palette:

Crimson Wine — festive wear, family gatherings, office celebrations, or as a statement ethnic look for plus-size fashionistas.

💃🏻Styling Tip:

Accessorize with jhumkas, bangles, and juttis for a complete ethnic ensemble. A soft braid or open curls with light makeup will beautifully complement the outfit's floral vibe.

title: Dark Peach Cotton Silk Sari with Intricate Thread Work & Blouse Piece
body_html:
Product Details

Material composition Cotton Silk
Color Dark Peach
Length 5.5 m
Blouse Unstitched
Care Instructions Dry Clean Only

 

This elegant saree is made from a blend of cotton and silk, providing a soft and comfortable wear. Adorned with intricate thread work and equipped with a blouse piece, this saree offers a versatile and stylish addition to your wardrobe. With a length of 5.5 meters, it provides ample fabric for effortless draping and a flattering fit.

title: Deep Emerald Green Velvet Embroidered Readymade Suit
body_html:
Product Details

Fabric Velvet Embroidered
Design Heavy embroidery work
Occasion Parties, Weddings, and Festive Occasions
Vibe Royal elegance with a soft, festive charm.

 

Step into winter in the most majestic way with this Winter Special Collection – an exquisite lineup of readymade velvet suits designed to add warmth, grandeur, and grace to your festive and wedding wardrobe.

🌈 Color Palette:

Deep Emerald Green—ideal for festivities, weddings and cultural events.

💃🏻Styling Tip:

Pair with embellished juttis or heels and statement jewelry. Go for soft curls or a sleek bun with a maang tikka for a complete royal look.

✨ Ideal for evening parties, festive events, or as a wedding outfit.

title: Designer Chinon Party Wear Dress - Mirror & Embroidery Work
body_html:
Product Details

Fabric Premium Chinon
Size Free Size (Full Stitch)
Design Real Chinon with mirror and embroidery work
Occasion Parties, Weddings, and Festive Occasions
Vibe Adds a regal and festive touch to your look


Elevate your style with our Designer Chinon Party Wear Dress, a perfect blend of luxury and elegance. This full-stitch, free-size dress is crafted from premium Real Chinon fabric with exquisite mirror and embroidery work, adding a touch of glamour to your festive look.

🌈 Available Colors:

  • Radiant Yellow: For a vibrant and joyful look.
  • Elegant Green: Adds a sophisticated and regal vibe.
  • Classic Red: Perfect for festivals and celebrations, bringing a traditional charm.

title: Digitally Printed Georgette Saree in Black
body_html:
Product Details

Fabric Premium Georgette 
Size Full Size with unstitched blouse piece
Design Digital Print 
Occasion Casual | Day Events | Destination Travel | Brunches | Resort Wear
Vibe Carefree Elegance Meets Playful Charm 


✨Perfect for scenic vacations, rooftop lunches, or art gallery strolls.✨

Step into the spotlight with a vivacious range of digitally printed georgette sarees inspired by the energy of modern women and the colors of nature. Perfect for your sunshine moments, these sarees blend bohemian spirit with contemporary elegance, making them ideal for brunches, holidays, and statement daywear.

The fabric flows like a breeze, draping effortlessly to enhance your silhouette while keeping you cool and chic.

🌈 Color Palette:

Black base with prints  —It showcases vibrant, abstract patterns in colors that echo spring gardens and mountain sunsets

💃🏼Style Tip:

Pair with minimalist earrings and juttis or strappy flats for a casual day look. Throw on a belt and oversized sunglasses to channel a resort-glam vibe.
tags: bookeasy, casual, ceremony, ethnic, festive wear, formal, georgette, indian tradtional, office wear, party wear, saree, traditional wear, versatile, wedding
